title: Give the Gift of Real Python
content: Looking to surprise the Python enthusiast in your life? AReal Python Membership Gift Cardis the perfect present for any aspiring coder or seasoned developer. A Real Python gift card gives access to allReal Python membershipfeatures: Choose the Perfect Gift: Membership Gift Card (1 Year)  Membership Gift Card (2 Years)  Membership Gift Card (3 Years)  Gift cards are delivered instantly, and all payments are processed securely by our trusted partner. Whether for a beginner or an advanced developer, our gift cards cater to all levels. Take the First Step: Simply select the desired gift card duration, clickAdd to Cart, and after a quick payment process, you’ll receive the secret redemption code. Give the gift of learning with Real Python, where the journey to mastery begins. Give a Pythonista the gift of learning today! How do I buy a gift card?Show/Hide Choose a gift card duration in the list above and click theAdd to Cartbutton. After completing payment you’ll immediately get access to the secret redemption code for your gift card. What will I receive?Show/Hide After completing payment, we’ll immediately email you a receipt for your purchase and an electronic gift card, so you can print it or forward it to someone else as a gift. How do I redeem a gift card?Show/Hide Go torealpython.com/redeemand enter the gift card code. You’ll receive confirmation that the subscription has been successfully applied to your account. That’s it! Credit card information is not required to redeem a gift card. Is this right for beginners?Show/Hide Our learning resources cover a range of skill levels, all the way from absolute beginner to experienced Pythonista. Take a look at ourguided learning pathsfor inspiration. Do gift cards expire?Show/Hide The gift card is valid 24 months from the moment the gift card was purchased. Once redeemed, the code is good for the length of the subscription that was gifted. For example, if you gift someone a year of membership, that year begins whenever they redeem it. Can I buy a physical gift subscription?Show/Hide We’ll email you an electronic gift card that you can print and then deliver by hand or by mail. The printed email will include all the information your recipient needs to redeem the gift. Do gift card purchases auto-renew?Show/Hide Gift cards are one-off purchases that do not automatically renew at the end of the membership term. Can I purchase a gift card for myself?Show/Hide Yes, you can purchase and redeem a gift card with the same Real Python account. How secure is my payment?Show/Hide We use Paddle for payment processing. Paddle exceeds the most stringent industry standards for security. To learn more about the technical details of Paddle’s secure payment infrastructure, view theirsecurity documentation. We do not have access to or store any credit card information. Need help? Askinfo@realpython.comor visit ourSupport Portal
